title: silene angustifolia subsp. reiseri
intro: Silene angustifolia subsp. reiseri, also known as the Reiser's catchfly, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation and pain, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Silene angustifolia subsp. reiseri include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
